signal: A quality workflow or action pin changes.
preventedFailure: A comment, another job, mutable action pin, permission expansion, timeout omission or extra release/mutation step falsely appears compliant.
recovery: Repair the exact tagged finding in .github/workflows/quality.yml.
reviewTrigger: Workflow, trigger, job, action, permission, timeout, concurrency or release graph change.
retirementCondition: A stronger schema-decoded CI workflow owner replaces this contract.

signal: Any public export, packed SDK, API, public docs/manifest, workflow or release-script source changes.
preventedFailure: A partial workflow graph claims release-readiness while skipping an owning boundary command.
recovery: Repair the named failed check and preserve CI report-only semantics.
reviewTrigger: Release check order, owning command, package graph or public boundary change.
retirementCondition: A stronger canonical graph replaces all nine ordered checks.

signal: A proposal adds recurring documentation or context freshness work.
preventedFailure: Untrusted generated output edits canonical context, self-trains or claims publication.
recovery: Quarantine the candidate and use separately authorized publication recovery.
reviewTrigger: Candidate source, retrieval, reviewer, publisher, retention or recovery contract change.
retirementCondition: A separately accepted canonical context-governance owner replaces this register.
